calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned from Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Karen Sarria.
Dept: 514. Judge: Angela Bradstreet. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185. Telephone: 415-551-5768. Email: adelgado@sftc.org. Bailiff: Deputy Chan.

Alan J. Sherwood, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff Midland Funding LLC.
No appearance by defendant Karen Sarria.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Account Stated was filed on January 4, 2019.
Defendant Karen Sarria's General Denial to plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 26, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on August 5, 2019, setting trial for today, December 16, 2019.
Declaration of Jeanette Ruff in lieu of live testimony pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 98 was filed on November 13, 2019 and served on defendant via US Mail that same day.
Proof of Service of the Declaration of Jeanette Ruff was filed with the Clerk's Office on November 13, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, December 16, 2019..

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Midland Funding LLC, and against defendant Karen Sarria, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,753.63.
Costs - Pursuant to timely filed Memorandum of Costs.
Total - $3,753.63.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Set For Trial On Dec-16-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
